title: Document CLI package split for maintainers
description: Record the structural refactor in the most relevant maintainer-facing documentation surface available in the repository, focusing on the new CLI package layout and where CLI tests now live. If no dedicated maintainer doc exists, capture the no-external-docs-needed conclusion in the reviewable documentation change.
acceptance_criteria: Maintainer-facing documentation reflects that CLI code now lives under `src/agent_takt/cli/` and CLI tests are split into dedicated files.
Documentation makes clear that the refactor is structural only and preserves public CLI behavior.
If the repository has no suitable docs surface, the bead produces the minimal repository-local documentation artifact or note needed to make that conclusion explicit.
conflict_risks: None — files created by this bead did not overlap with any other in-progress bead scope.
